---
title: "Regression I"
subtitle: "Subset selection and shrinkage"
date: "Sep 11, 2026"
date-format: long
---

Linear regression as a baseline; best-subset and stepwise selection; ridge regression and the lasso as principled alternatives when p is large or predictors are correlated.

**Assigned reading:** ISLR ch. 3, 6

---

## Materials

**Slides:** [Slides](slides_clean.pdf) | [Annotated slides](slides_annotated.pdf) | [Split view](slides_split.pdf)

**Code:** [fig1.R](code/fig1.R) [fig2.R](code/fig2.R) [fig3.R](code/fig3.R) [fig4.R](code/fig4.R) [helper.R](code/helper.R) [model1.R](code/model1.R)

**Supplementary readings:** [Frank and Friedman (1993)](readings/Frank and Friedman (1993).pdf) [Heinze et al. (2017)](readings/Heinze et al. (2017).pdf)
